repository.name: voynich-os
repository.current_checkpoint: Voynich OS v12.2 - RCC Nexus Professional Spine
repository.purpose: Experimental symbolic-analysis repository for Voynich Manuscript transcription structures.
repository.safe_claim: Voynich OS tests whether Voynich transcription structures can be represented as symbolic graph/state/process systems and whether those models emit stable, inspectable, reproducible diagnostic artifacts.

data.role: Corpus, generated folio outputs, meaning/vector layers, ledgers, and manuscript states.

docs.role: Claim boundary, reproducibility, context, architecture, and reflection documents.

rcc.role: RCC Nexus route maps, protocols, and agent handoff surfaces.

scripts.role: Audit, normalization, RCC, validation, and future pipeline scripts.

reports.role: RCC reports, README audits, release reports, reorganization plans.

artifacts.role: Future generated run artifacts and evidence packages.

sources.role: Future source provenance and manuscript/transcription source cards.

visuals.role: Future charts, diagrams, and public visual evidence surfaces.
